pageContext.name: Godzilla
pageContext.description: Godzilla has been freed from Mount Mihara, leaving a trail of destruction in its wake as it roams across Japan!  Measuring a monstrous 8 tall and 14 long, this highly articulated Toho ULTIMATES! figure of Godzilla features premium detail based on its appearance in the 1989 film Godzilla vs Biollante.  Accessories include interchangeable heads and hands as well as a battle-damaged hand and Biollante vine wrap to recreate their epic battle. But this is no time to stop and smell the roses, this intricately sculpted, made-to-order Toho ULTIMATES! figure will only be available for pre-order for a limited time, so don't miss out!
